prompts.name: simple
prompts.bad_prompt: a microscope image of an unhealthy stem cell colony
prompts.good_prompt: a microscope image of a healthy stem cell colony

prompts.name: domain
prompts.bad_prompt: a phase-contrast microscopy image of a differentiating, low-quality human pluripotent stem cell colony with irregular borders
prompts.good_prompt: a phase-contrast microscopy image of a uniform, high-quality undifferentiated human pluripotent stem cell colony with smooth tight borders

prompts.name: contrast
prompts.bad_prompt: a photo of cells that look sick, irregular, or differentiated
prompts.good_prompt: a photo of cells that look healthy, uniform, and undifferentiated

prompts.name: morphological
prompts.bad_prompt: a phase-contrast image of a stem cell colony with rough edges and differentiating cells in the center
prompts.good_prompt: a phase-contrast image of a stem cell colony with a tight smooth border and uniform morphology
